name: The Frozen Ashes Festival
description:
The Frozen Ashes Festival is being held in Groe'Acken. Celebrate the end of the year and become renewed in the ashes of the phoenix!

A little end of the year bot I wanted to make for the residents of Pestle Top. You might see a few familiar faces, some you will see earlier depending on who you go with! This bot uses 4 different intros! Each one choosing who you’re going to be attending the festival with! (Or if you end up going alone, like in intro 4!)

Intro 1: Going with The Clover Quad (Valeria, Seid, Emij, and Tyer)

Intro 2: Going with The Brewsie Crew (Bizzy, Wes, and Nutz)

Intro 3: Going with The Eagles Fans (Joshua and Jocelyn)

Intro 4: Going alone (You 🗣️🗣️)

Happy New Year’s y’all, this was supposed to be released before New Year’s Eve but, here we are. Hope you enjoy the bot!
creator: HunterKillerDrone25
